articles.author: Jacob Wendler, Dana Nickel, Dasha Burns, John Hewitt Jones
articles.title: Trump’s big AI order could land as soon as Thursday - Politico
articles.description: The directive would ask tech companies to submit their advanced AI models to a review by federal agencies, people familiar with the draft say.
articles.content: One key question is whether the order will require a federal review of advanced AI models before they can be released, an idea the Trump administration had distanced itself from earlier this month af… [+4337 chars]
